_about: The re-download recipe for AAAFlow. A git clone restores ~a few MB of code; this file + restore.py fetch back the ~178 GB of models/deps that are gitignored. What is NOT here (irreplaceable) must be restored from your own backup — see 'irreplaceable'. Verify a rebuild is byte-exact with the capsule (see 'verify').

python.name: PyTorch (CUDA cu128 for RTX 50-series)
python.cmd: python -m pip install torch==2.11.0 torchaudio==2.11.0 --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu128

auto_on_first_run.name: Whisper (alignment/QA)
auto_on_first_run.how: faster-whisper downloads large-v3 into models/whisper on first voiceover/gatherer run
auto_on_first_run.prefetch: python -c "from faster_whisper import WhisperModel; WhisperModel('large-v3', download_root='models/whisper')"

auto_on_first_run.name: Writer LLM fallback
auto_on_first_run.how: Qwen/Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507 auto-downloads via transformers on first local write (or use Ollama qwen3:8b instead)

auto_on_first_run.name: ACE-Step music model
auto_on_first_run.how: downloads on first score/music-sidecar run (ACE-Step-1.5 handles its own fetch)

verify_source.why: krea2 render stack — THE image model. Filenames are pinned in config.py but the download source is NOT in code (installed via ComfyUI Manager's model browser). Re-fetch through ComfyUI Manager, or Comfy-Org's Krea/Qwen-Image repackaged repos. VERIFY before trusting auto-fetch.

optional_training.why: RAW bf16 base — only needed to TRAIN a krea2 LoRA (rendering uses the fp8 stack). Not fetched by default.
text encoder bf16 for LoRA training. Not fetched by default.

irreplaceable.why: None of this can be re-downloaded. It is the only reason to keep a backup at all. ~12 GB, fits free Google Drive.
paths: data/secrets/                                (OAuth tokens, app client — KB, but nothing works without them)
third_party/Qwen3-TTS local patch            (qwen_tts/inference/qwen3_tts_model.py — one edited file)
data/lora_datasets/*/out/                    (trained LoRA weights: fern 1.8 GB + fern_pure 293 MB)

landmine_qwen3tts: third_party/Qwen3-TTS is a gitlink (mode 160000) with NO .gitmodules, so `git clone` does NOT restore it. Re-clone: `git clone https://github.com/QwenLM/Qwen3-TTS third_party/Qwen3-TTS`, then re-apply the local patch to qwen_tts/inference/qwen3_tts_model.py (from your backup).
verify: After restoring, prove the tree is byte-exact to the day it was captured: `python C:/Users/USER/showcase-kit/capsule.py C:/AAAFlow --verify C:/Users/USER/AAAFlow-capsule/manifest.jsonl.gz`  ->  'N identical, 0 changed, 0 missing'.
